members.name: FromDictionary
members.summary: Creates a new GLTFBufferView instance by parsing the given [Dictionary].

members.name: LoadBufferViewData
members.summary: Loads the buffer view data from the buffer referenced by this buffer view in the given [GLTFState]. Interleaved data with a byte stride is not yet supported by this method. The data is returned as a [PackedByteArray].

members.name: ToDictionary
members.summary: Serializes this GLTFBufferView instance into a [Dictionary].

members.name: Buffer
members.summary: The index of the buffer this buffer view is referencing. If [code]-1[/code], this buffer view is not referencing any buffer.

members.name: ByteLength
members.summary: The length, in bytes, of this buffer view. If [code]0[/code], this buffer view is empty.

members.name: ByteOffset
members.summary: The offset, in bytes, from the start of the buffer to the start of this buffer view.

members.name: ByteStride
members.summary: The stride, in bytes, between interleaved data. If [code]-1[/code], this buffer view is not interleaved.

members.name: Indices
members.summary: [code]true[/code] if the GLTFBufferView's OpenGL GPU buffer type is an [code]ELEMENT_ARRAY_BUFFER[/code] used for vertex indices (integer constant [code]34963[/code]). [code]false[/code] if the buffer type is any other value. See [url=https://github.com/KhronosGroup/glTF-Tutorials/blob/master/gltfTutorial/gltfTutorial_005_BuffersBufferViewsAccessors.md]Buffers, BufferViews, and Accessors[/url] for possible values. This property is set on import and used on export.

members.name: VertexAttributes
members.summary: [code]true[/code] if the GLTFBufferView's OpenGL GPU buffer type is an [code]ARRAY_BUFFER[/code] used for vertex attributes (integer constant [code]34962[/code]). [code]false[/code] if the buffer type is any other value. See [url=https://github.com/KhronosGroup/glTF-Tutorials/blob/master/gltfTutorial/gltfTutorial_005_BuffersBufferViewsAccessors.md]Buffers, BufferViews, and Accessors[/url] for possible values. This property is set on import and used on export.
